offer: For property managers processing 5–15 maintenance requests/month, inadequate maintenance causes costly emergency repairs. We recommend preventative repairs instead of manual tracking of maintenance history.
problem: Inadequate maintenance leading to emergency repairs
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community groups for property management tools
try_it: Let users explore maintenance history log with 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
